data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified on main via merge commit 9c9340b340d6. All 4 requirements confirmed: tally removed, combined All Steps chart via buildCombinedSeries, Last 24h preset with rangeLabel display on date selectors, per-step leaderboard with margin in pp format. Quality gates: TypeScript clean, 2237 tests passing, no audit-related lint errors. No regressions.
